records.ety: [L. infelicitas: cf. F. inflicit. See In- not, and Felicity.]

defs: The state or quality of being infelicitous; unhappiness; misery; wretchedness; misfortune; lack of suitableness or appropriateness.
quotes: Whatever is the ignorance and infelicity of the present state, we were made wise and happy.

defs: That (as an act, word, expression, etc.) which is infelicitous; as, infelicities of speech.
